_publications._publicationTitle: Patient-reported measures of tinnitus for individuals with neurofibromatosis type 2-related schwannomatosis: Recommendations for clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: Sixteen PROMs met inclusion criteria and were included in this study for extensive review according to our PRO-RATE procedures
resourceName: Patient-Reported Outcomes Rating Acceptance Tool for Endpoints (PRO-RATE)
details: Used to evaluate 16 PROMs that met inclusion criteria for extensive review according to PRO-RATE procedures
